arts.ttl: Unai Emery discusses sending Marcus Rashford back to Man Utd - 'Don't want to waste time'
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford scored his first two goals for Aston Villa to guide his loan club past Preston North End and into the semi-finals of the FA Cup on Sunday afternoon

arts.ttl: The Verdict: Rashford confidence returning after starring in Villa win
arts.sum: Sky Sports News' Ben Ransom reviews Aston Villa's 3-0 victory over Preston North End with Marcus Rashford netting two goals.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford still looking to improve after firing Villa into FA Cup semis
arts.sum: The on-loan Manchester United forward struck twice in a 3-0 win at Preston.

arts.ttl: ‘Great feeling’: Rashford delight after double sends Aston Villa to Wembley
arts.sum: ‘I am injury free and just enjoying my football for now’ Villa to play Palace in FA Cup semi-final after Preston win Marcus Rashford said he was “just enjoying my football” after scoring twice in a 3-0 win against Preston to secure Aston Villa an FA Cup semi-final against Crystal Palace. Jacob Ramsey added to Rashford’s first goals since 1 December. The England striker had not scored in nine appearances for his new club since joining on loan in the winter transfer window. His final game for United came on 12 December and Ruben Amorim later announced he would rather put 63-year-old goalkeeping coach, Jorge Vital, on the bench than Rashford. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford aims subtle dig at Man United boss Ruben Amorim after scoring his first goals for Aston Villa in FA Cup quarter-final win over Preston
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford launched a subtle dig at Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim after scoring his first goals for Aston Villa. Rashford left United on loan last month.

arts.ttl: Why Unai Emery won't waste time thinking about Aston Villa transfer deal for Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: Unai Emery believes that Marcus Rashford has taken a step forward in his adaptation at Aston Villa by scoring a brace in the FA Cup quarter-finals but was reluctant to discuss the possibility of signing the Manchester United loanee permanently. Why Unai Emery won't waste time thinking about Aston Villa transfer deal for Marcus Rashford

arts.ttl: What Man Utd loanee Marcus Rashford admitted after Aston Villa FA Cup double
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford admits he is finally enjoying his football at Aston Villa after scoring his first couple of goals for the club against Preston in the FA Cup quarter-finals. Aston Villa's on-loan forward Marcus Rashford scored a brace against Preston North End in the FA Cup quarter-finals

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford’s Aston Villa renaissance still needs work – but FA Cup offers historic opportunity
arts.sum: Preston 0-3 Aston Villa: The forward is heading in the right direction after his first Villa goals booked a semi-final with Crystal Palace at Wembley

arts.ttl: Joe Hart squirms as Micah Richards is put on the spot after Aston Villa FA Cup draw
arts.sum: Joe Hart and Micah Richards were part of the BBC's punditry team for Aston Villa's FA Cup quarter-final win over Preston North End Joe Hart squirms as Micah Richards is put on the spot after Aston Villa FA Cup draw

arts.ttl: What Marcus Rashford did to Marco Asensio before sealing Aston Villa triumph
arts.sum: Joe Hart believes he spotted the clearest sign yet that Marcus Rashford's confidence is growing in an Aston Villa shirt after the forward broke his duck in a claret and blue shirt at Preston North End on Sunday. Aston Villa pair Marcus Rashford and Marco Asensio both like taking penalties - the former got his way at Preston
